subcodes.first_line: O thou who proclaimeth the praise of the Ancient Beauty! In this time when the very heart of these yearning souls is stirred by the sweet fragrances of remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بثنای جمال قدم در این زمان که هویت قلب این مشتاقان از نفحات ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
